meta.name: Slide Scoring
meta.description: Score or label the slide open in a viewer. Scores are dispatched through the IO pipeline, so a deployment can route them to MLflow, GitHub, a REST backend or anywhere else without changing this plugin.

toolbar.title: Scoring
toolbar.noSlide: No slide is open in this viewer

error.noSlideId: This viewer's slide has no stable identity, so its score could not be recorded.
error.notPermitted: You do not have permission to score slides.
error.failed: The score could not be saved: {{reason}}
error.badSchema: The scoring vocabulary is misconfigured: every label must map to a number.
error.importFailed: Saved slide scores could not be read and were ignored.
